title: Ocean King Suite
description:
A private veranda above the sea

Wake to the sound of waves in our signature 680 sq ft suite. A private teak balcony frames uninterrupted views of the bay, while the marble spa bath and walk-in rain shower turn every evening into a ritual.

In your suite

  • King bed dressed in Egyptian cotton linens
  • Nespresso bar with local specialty roasts
  • Smart mirror with in-room wellness app
  • Daily turndown with artisan pastries

Breakfast is served on your terrace at the hour you choose.
